Step.name: v0.4 trace replay — must pass v0.5 validator with zero new-rule violations
Step.Goal: Confirm pre-v0.5 traces parse-and-validate cleanly under the v0.5 validator.
Step.Hypothesis: The new rules gate on Concluding presence; a Concluding-free trace bypasses all six.
Step.Evidence: REFER:H_01 — validator.validate() short-circuits when no Concluding atoms are present.
